mutations.action: Remove 'Execution Derivation' from required Builder input contract.
Remove repository discovery of Execution Derivation as an external artifact.
Exclude Execution Derivation from required repository-governed artifact validation.
Insert deterministic Execution Derivation generation immediately after governance validation succeeds.
Validate generated Execution Derivation before packaging.
Package Builder-generated Execution Derivation instead of copying one from the repository.

acceptance_criteria: Execution Derivation is no longer a required repository input.
Builder generates Execution Derivation deterministically from validated governance artifacts.
Generated Execution Derivation is validated before packaging.
Generated Execution Derivation is certified as Builder-produced.
Builder package contains the generated Execution Derivation.
Builder invocation succeeds without requiring an externally authored Execution Derivation.
protected_principles: Governance hierarchy preserved (FAB -> IA -> CIB -> ICM).
Builder validation and certification remain intact.
